zh.of,Reynel,Haute-Marne,France: 法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內雷恩爾
zh.Grandpré, Ardennes, France: 法國德 艾斯特阿爾登斯格藍德普雷
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gauthier de Reynel於大約1180年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內雷恩爾時，他的父親Wiard de Reynel42歲，母親Emmeline de Gondrecourt30歲。他於大約1220年與Helisende de Trainell結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.of,Reynel,Haute-Marne,France: 法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內雷恩爾
zh-hans.Grandpré, Ardennes, France: 法国德 艾斯特阿爾登斯格藍德普雷
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gauthier de Reynel于大约1180年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內雷恩爾时，他的父亲Wiard de Reynel42岁，母亲Emmeline de Gondrecourt30岁。他于大约1220年与Helisende de Trainell结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Reynel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Raynor
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Rainer, Reiner, Renier (ancient Germanic Raginhari, from ragin ‘counsel’ + hari, heri ‘army’). The surname was later much confused with Reynold and Renard .

nameMeanings.name: Gauthier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Gauthier de Reynel was born about 1180, in Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Wiard de Reynel, was 42 and his mother, Emmeline de Gondrecourt, was 30. He married Helisende de Trainell about 1220. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gauthier de Reynel est né environ 1180, à Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Wiard de Reynel, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Emmeline de Gondrecourt, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Helisende de Trainell environ 1220. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gauthier de Reynel um 1180 in Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wiard de Reynel 42 und seine Mutter Emmeline de Gondrecourt 30. Er hat um 1220 Helisende de Trainell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gauthier de Reynel è nato il circa 1180 nel Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Wiard de Reynel, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Emmeline de Gondrecourt, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Helisende de Trainell circa 1220. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.of,Reynel,Haute-Marne,France: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンレイネル
ja.Grandpré, Ardennes, France: フランスグランド エストアルデンスグランドプルe
ja.lifeSummary: Gauthier de Reynelが約1180年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンレイネルで生まれた時，父Wiard de Reynelは42歳，母Emmeline de Gondrecourtは30歳であった。約1220年にHelisende de Trainellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Gauthier de Reynel(이)가 대략 1180년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 리넬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wiard de Reynel(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Emmeline de Gondrecourt(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1220년 Helisende de Trainell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gauthier de Reynel nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Wiard de Reynel, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Emmeline de Gondrecourt, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Helisende de Trainell aproximadamente 1220. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gauthier de Reynel родился около 1180 г. в местности ринель, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Wiard de Reynel было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Emmeline de Gondrecourt, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Helisende de Trainell около 1220 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gauthier de Reynel nació aproximadamente 1180, en Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Wiard de Reynel, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Emmeline de Gondrecourt, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Helisende de Trainell aproximadamente 1220. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas.
